description: Binance Charity is a blockchain-powered nonprofit organization that ensures 100% of donations reach their intended causes. The organization launched the CryptoAgainstCOVID campaign to deliver PPE to over 300 hospitals globally, utilizing blockchain for transparency and accountability throughout the donation process.
topic_summary: Binance Charity enhances philanthropy through blockchain, ensuring transparency in donations and delivering PPE to hospitals during the COVID-19 pandemic. Donors can track their contributions from donation to delivery, fostering trust and accountability [t=20:72].
